title: Capitals quizzed on how child safety should fit into digital fairness rules
summary_full: The Cyprus presidency wants an in-depth discussion on child safeguarding measures in the Digital Fairness Act (DFA), according to a document obtained by Euractiv
summary_public: The Cyprus presidency wants an in-depth discussion on child safeguarding measures in the Digital Fairness Act (DFA), according to a document obtained by Euractiv

CY.label: positive
CY.evidence: Cyprus presidency wants an in-depth discussion on child safeguarding measures
